comparison_notes.csv_cells: Compare CSV cell values after converting implementation-native values to strings unless a test states otherwise.
comparison_notes.metadata_values: Compare metadata values with their specified integer or string types.
comparison_notes.errors: Exact exception classes and message text are implementation-specific; compare error_code where possible.

schedules.name: positive
schedules.description: Valid INC and plain CSV read tests.

schedules.name: negative
schedules.description: Invalid files that conforming readers or schema readers should reject.
